## Summary

<!-- Briefly explain what this pull request changes. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Explain why this change is needed and which problem it solves. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Privacy or security improvement
- [ ] Docker or deployment update
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Other

## Testing

<!-- Describe how the change was tested. -->

- [ ] Automated tests passed
- [ ] The application starts successfully
- [ ] The main page loads correctly
- [ ] Fingerprint submission was tested
- [ ] Malformed input was tested
- [ ] Docker image builds successfully, if applicable

## Data Collection and Privacy

<!-- Describe any change to collected, stored, logged, or transmitted data. -->

- [ ] No new browser attributes are collected
- [ ] New or changed attributes are documented
- [ ] No real fingerprint records are included
- [ ] No cookies, session identifiers, authorization headers, or access tokens are included
- [ ] Logs do not expose unnecessary request data
- [ ] Screenshots and examples contain only synthetic data

## Storage and Logging

- [ ] Database changes are documented
- [ ] Generated databases and logs are not committed
- [ ] Sensitive files are not exposed through the static directory
- [ ] Database queries remain parameterized

## Dependencies

- [ ] No new dependencies were added
- [ ] New dependencies are justified in the pull request description
- [ ] Dependency changes were tested for compatibility

## Documentation

- [ ] Documentation was updated
- [ ] Documentation changes are not required

## Checklist

- [ ] The pull request contains one focused change
- [ ] Existing behaviour is preserved unless intentionally changed
- [ ] No real user, browser, or infrastructure data is included
- [ ] No unrelated formatting or refactoring is included
- [ ] Automated checks pass
